case_title: FELLMAN, R. R. VS FEDERAL EXPRESS CORP.

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY FELLMAN, R. R. AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELLMAN, R. R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORP. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS INVALID; NAME & TITLE TO PARTY IN ITEM 2A NOT SPECIFIED.
COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM FEDERAL EXPRESS FILED.
